seoTitle: How to Download a Udemy Certificate as PDF
metaDescription: Find your completed course and save your Udemy certificate as a PDF on desktop so you have a portable record for job applications or your resume.
intro: Once you finish a Udemy course, having the certificate saved as a PDF makes it easy to attach to a resume, portfolio, or LinkedIn profile. This covers logging into your account, finding the completed course, and downloading the certificate to your desktop.

steps.heading: Sign in to your Udemy account
steps.body: Log in from a desktop browser so you can access your account and course history.

steps.heading: Locate the completed course
steps.body: Go to your list of enrolled courses and find the one you've finished and want a certificate for.

steps.heading: Open the certificate page
steps.body: From the course, find the certificate of completion associated with it.

steps.heading: Download the certificate as a PDF
steps.body: Save the certificate to your desktop as a PDF file so you have a permanent, shareable copy.

faq.question: Do all Udemy courses come with a certificate?
faq.answer: Only courses that are eligible for a certificate of completion will have one available to download once finished.

faq.question: Can I download the certificate from a phone instead?
faq.answer: This guide focuses on the desktop process, which is generally the more reliable way to get a clean PDF download.

faq.question: Is a Udemy certificate useful for job applications?
faq.answer: Yes, it can serve as proof of the skills and coursework you've completed, which is helpful to include with applications or on a professional profile.

faq.question: What if I can't find the certificate for a course I completed?
faq.answer: Double-check that the course qualifies for a certificate and that you're viewing it from your completed courses list rather than in-progress ones.
